title: V1.4 WS8 — nexus-local-db sqlx migration (unified DB engine)
notes: QC Approve with residuals. QA passed. Merged to feature/v1.4.

metadata.description: Migrate the entire workspace from rusqlite + deadpool-sqlite + bespoke sequential migrations to sqlx + sqlx migrate. Ports ~34 files / ~193 references across nexus-local-db / nexus42 / nexus42d / nexus-sync. Four existing code-form migrations (v2 local_identities, v3 soul_meta, v4 memory_pipeline + implicit baseline) become timestamped .sql files under crates/nexus-local-db/migrations/. workspace_meta.db_schema_version key preserved (mirrored from sqlx _sqlx_migrations). Hard prerequisite for WS2 Task 3 (SqliteSessionStorage shares the same pool on the unified state.db). PM-approved 2026-04-17 after dual-engine / dual-file SSOT conflict review (both patterns rejected).
metadata.parallelism: fully parallel with WS1/WS4/WS5 (no DB touch); blocks WS2 Task 3 only
batch_1_commits: d41ced5 chore(local-db): sqlx workspace dep + pool bootstrap (WS8 T1)
2a5ae6b feat(local-db): single-file dev-mode schema with all tables (WS8 T2)
eba428f feat(local-db): async versions API + init_pool convenience (WS8 T3)
batch_2_commits: f6761cb feat(local-db): identity CRUDs async sqlx (WS8 T4)
a9129ab feat(local-db): soul_meta / pending_review / memory_fragment async sqlx (WS8 T5)
67b74db feat(daemon): port nexus42d DB layer + handlers to async sqlx (WS8 T6)
batch_3_commits: 428f967 feat(cli): port nexus42 CLI + manuscript manager to async sqlx (WS8 T7)
batch_4_commits: 5c50689 feat(sync): port nexus-sync outbox to async sqlx + CI sqlx offline (WS8 T8)
fd0ecd6 docs(ws8): revise local-db-refactor to v2 + tighten orchestration §4.3 + drop legacy deps (WS8 T9)
9045b36 chore(ws8): lint fixes for final CI gate (WS8 T10)
metadata.dev_mode_note: T2 adapted per PM directive: ONE migration file instead of 5 incremental files. Formal migration history added at T9.
metadata.residual_summary: 5 residuals (R1-R5): 3 medium defer, 1 low accept, 1 nit accept — all tracked for V1.5
